title: Meeting Agenda
scenario: Create a meeting agenda for a team meeting to discuss the progress of a software development project. The agenda should include a title, a list of topics to be discussed, and a rough estimate of the time required for each topic. The output should be a clear and concise table summarizing the meeting agenda.
constraints: Must include a title and a table with at least 3 columns

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is under 200 words and includes a title and a table with at least 3 columns.
Check if the table is correctly formatted and has a clear structure.
Check if the description of each topic is clear and concise.
